headline: US filings for jobless aid tick up last week to 210,000 but remain at historically healthy levels
summary: The number of Americans applying for jobless aid inched up last week as employers continue to retain workers despite a labor market that has weakened considerably in the past year.  U.S. applications for jobless aid for the week ending March 21 rose by 5,000 to 210,000 from the previous week’s 205,000, the Labor Department reported Thursday.  Filings for unemployment benefits are considered representative of U.S. layoffs and are close to a real-time indicator of the health of the job market.

content.title: US filings for jobless aid tick up last week to 210,000 but remain at historically healthy levels
content.summary: The number of Americans applying for jobless aid inched up last week as employers continue to retain workers despite a labor market that has weakened considerably in the past year.  U.S. applications for jobless aid for the week ending March 21 rose by 5,000 to 210,000 from the previous week’s 205,000, the Labor Department reported Thursday.  Filings for unemployment benefits are considered representative of U.S. layoffs and are close to a real-time indicator of the health of the job market.

headline: Apple Plans to Open Up Siri to Rival AI Assistants in iOS 27 Update

headline: OpenAI Warning Puts Spotlight On Microsoft AI Reliance And Investor Risk
summary: OpenAI has highlighted its heavy reliance on Microsoft as a key business risk as it prepares for a potential IPO. The company is working to diversify its partnerships, including new cloud collaborations with Amazon and Oracle. Reports suggest tension around a reported $50b OpenAI AWS cloud deal, with Microsoft reportedly weighing legal options. Nearly half of Microsoft's commercial AI backlog is tied to OpenAI, putting fresh attention on the durability of this partnership. Microsoft...
